description: Determines the specific effect for Nature & Elements spell types. Roll 1d10, 2d10, or 3d10 based on Powerful results.

descriptionTranslations.en: Determines the specific effect for Nature & Elements spell types. Roll 1d10, 2d10, or 3d10 based on Powerful results.

entries.result: Sense the condition of the natural world around you, such as detecting toxins in the ground or the status of local animals

resultTranslations.en: Sense the condition of the natural world around you, such as detecting toxins in the ground or the status of local animals

entries.result: Pacify a wild animal so that it becomes your friend

resultTranslations.en: Pacify a wild animal so that it becomes your friend

entries.result: Call animals to you, they will obey your commands

resultTranslations.en: Call animals to you, they will obey your commands

entries.result: Instantly grow food from the ground or cause water to bubble up

resultTranslations.en: Instantly grow food from the ground or cause water to bubble up

entries.result: Cause plants to instantly grow and thrive

resultTranslations.en: Cause plants to instantly grow and thrive

entries.result: Animate and control plants around you

resultTranslations.en: Animate and control plants around you

entries.result: Speak and communicate with plants or animals

resultTranslations.en: Speak and communicate with plants or animals

entries.result: Temporarily acquire or bestow an aspect of something in nature, such as growing claws or fangs, or having barklike skin for armor

resultTranslations.en: Temporarily acquire or bestow an aspect of something in nature, such as growing claws or fangs, or having barklike skin for armor

entries.result: Choose the most dramatic effect from 1-8 for this context

resultTranslations.en: Choose the most dramatic effect from 1-8 for this context

entries.result: Transform a living being, including yourself, into a natural animal

resultTranslations.en: Transform a living being, including yourself, into a natural animal

entries.result: Create an element from nowhere, such as flame in your palm or wind around you

resultTranslations.en: Create an element from nowhere, such as flame in your palm or wind around you

entries.result: Damage the natural world, such as causing plants to wither or rocks to crack

resultTranslations.en: Damage the natural world, such as causing plants to wither or rocks to crack

entries.result: Transform a living being, including yourself, into a plant

resultTranslations.en: Transform a living being, including yourself, into a plant

entries.result: Transform a living being, including yourself, into a mineral like rock or crystal

resultTranslations.en: Transform a living being, including yourself, into a mineral like rock or crystal

entries.result: Choose the most dramatic effect from 1-15 for this context

resultTranslations.en: Choose the most dramatic effect from 1-15 for this context

entries.result: Create a living elemental from a common element, such as water or earth

resultTranslations.en: Create a living elemental from a common element, such as water or earth

entries.result: Summon or control major weather effects, such as storms

resultTranslations.en: Summon or control major weather effects, such as storms

entries.result: Contact a god of nature, a major elemental entity, or nature itself

resultTranslations.en: Contact a god of nature, a major elemental entity, or nature itself

entries.result: Create new natural forms of life by combining existing forms. Reshape nature

resultTranslations.en: Create new natural forms of life by combining existing forms. Reshape nature

entries.result: Choose the most dramatic effect from 1-24 for this context
